title: Audio
description: PsychoPy Audio/Sound component for audio playback

id.description: Unique identifier for the audio component

sound.description: A sound file (e.g. *.wav, *.mp3) or a number for a tone

stopWithRoutine.description: Should the sound stop when the Routine ends?

forceEndRoutine.description: Should a response force the end of the Routine?

minTime.description: Minimum time to play the audio in milliseconds

maxTime.description: Maximum time to play the audio in milliseconds
